name: XPG CORE REACTOR II 750W 80 Plus Gold Fully Modular Power Supply
highlights: CORE REACTOR II is a top-performing power supply unit designed for ATX 3.0 compliance with a modular cable design and an 80 PLUS GOLD certification. These power supplies thrive in high-performance scenarios like servers or workstation setups, where a lot of power is needed.

CORE REACTOR II series power supply units meet Intel ATX 3.0 design guide specifications and feature a 12VHPWR connector. By upgrading to an ATX 3.0-compliant power supply, you’ll be fully equipped for the upcoming wave of high-performance components. A must for the modern gamer, creator, or AI developer. Stay ahead of the curve by upgrading to an ATX 3.0 PSU, the new standard in PC hardware.

CORE REACTOR II units recieved 80 PLUS GOLD certifications for efficiency, achieving up to 91.40% (115V) efficiency at 50% load. It comes in 1200W, 1000W, 850W, 750W, and 650W models for varying user needs and scenarios. It’s the perfect PSU for mid-to-high level components, including the latest CPUs and GPUs.

The intelligent fan curve ensures quiet operation, even under full power load. By starting the fan at a low RPM, fan performance is both enhanced and extended, thereby increasing the power supply unit’s lifespan.
CORE REACTOR II features top-tier 105°C Japanese capacitors, ensuring exceptional stability and reliability of the PSU for many years of dependable performance.
description: XPG CORE REACTOR II 750W 80 Plus® Gold Fully Modular Power Supply Price in Pakistan Specification Details Model XPG CORE REACTOR II 750W Power Output 750 Watts Efficiency Rating 80 Plus® Gold Form Factor ATX Modularity Fully Modular Cooling 120mm Fluid Dynamic Bearing (FDB) Fan Input Voltage 100-240V AC Frequency Range 50-60Hz Connector Types 1 x 24-Pin ATX 2 x 8-Pin (4+4) EPS12V 4 x 8-Pin (6+2) PCIe 10 x SATA 4 x Molex Protection Features OVP, UVP, OPP, SCP, OTP Dimensions (L x W x H) 140mm x 1
